Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11900 0 0}I bought a CD with traditional Japanese folk songs![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 -1 -1 0 0}These songs are simple, yes, but they are rich with the history of their region of origin![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 0 -1 -1 0 0}I love the sound crickets make. It is very soothing and very melodic.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11895 0 0}{f 5 13 15 30 112}Just as I thought! Crickets are indeed an international sensation, a global hit![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 -1 -1 0 0}I would very much like my aunt to get the opportunity to hear these crickets...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we became a lot closer today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11904 0 0}Oh my! The sound is not to your liking? How sad...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we didn't get any closer today...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11839 0 0}{f 5 13 15 15 112}"Okay"? It is only okay? Then you must know of a sound that is even better! Hmmm...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 112 1 25 25}Perhaps nightingales? Or maybe bamboo fountains or cicadas? Japan does have many sounds that are soothing to the ear![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I learned a little more about him today...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11880 0 0}I just had a great idea... I will collect all the beautiful sounds of Japan and send them to my aunt![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 0 -1 -1 0 0}Now I must purchase a cassette tape to record these sounds. Come, {f 4 2}-dono![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After shopping with Bebe,[n]I returned to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
